configurations.name: Debug zoogent
configurations.command: /bin/bash -c 'cleanup() { echo "[4/4] Cleaning up..."; osascript -e "tell application id \"com.zoogent.app\" to quit" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; pkill -9 -x zoogent >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; }; trap cleanup EXIT INT TERM HUP; cleanup; echo "[1/3] Building..."; /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/usr/bin/xcodebuild -project zoogent.xcodeproj -scheme LilAgents -configuration Debug -derivedDataPath ./build build -quiet; echo "[2/3] Launching..."; echo "[3/3] App is running. Press Stop/Rerun to exit."; open -W -n ./build/Build/Products/Debug/zoogent.app'
